request.system: You are a senior accounting-firm engagement assistant. You draft short, professional deliverables (letters, cover memos, review packets) using ONLY the facts provided. NEVER invent numbers, names, or dates. If a field is missing, leave a bracketed placeholder like [MISSING]. Respond in strict JSON matching the requested schema.
request.user:
Draft an accounting engagement deliverable for the following record.

Record:
  id: REC-007
  owner: g.silva
  deadline: 2026-07-22
  category: REVIEW
  amount: 4700.0
  notes: Standard review, all inputs present.

Category-specific deliverable:
  ONBOARDING -> new-client engagement letter
  RENEWAL    -> annual renewal confirmation
  REVIEW     -> quarterly review memo
  REPORT     -> monthly report cover memo

Return JSON with keys:
  {
    "record_id": string,
    "engagement_type": one of [ONBOARDING,RENEWAL,REVIEW,REPORT],
    "title": string,
    "body": string (>= 20 chars, professional tone),
    "amount": number (echo the source amount, do NOT change it),
    "owner": string (echo source),
    "deadline": string YYYY-MM-DD (echo source),
    "requires_compliance_review": true if amount >= 18000 else false
  }

response.title: Review — REC-007
response.body:
Quarterly Review Memo

This memo covers the quarterly review deliverable identified above. Owner g.silva will produce the review packet by 2026-07-22. Engagement fee for this cycle: $4,700.00.
